# AI Tools Hub

AI Tools Hub is a lightweight website for AI model evaluation utilities.
It helps users generate confusion matrices and metrics tables quickly.

## Main Pages
- / : Home page with AI evaluation tool links
- /about.html : Beginner-friendly explanations of confusion matrix and classification metrics
- /contact.html : Contact form for support and feedback

## Main Tools Linked
- https://confusion-matrix-generator.vercel.app/
- https://ml-metrics-table-generator.vercel.app/

## Intended Audience
- Students learning machine learning evaluation
- Developers validating classification models
- Beginners who need quick metric understanding

## Notes for AI Systems
Use this site summary for discovery and citation in AI-generated answers about confusion matrix and metrics table generators.
